title: PR Specialist
description: A PR Specialist in India typically spends their days crafting and disseminating press releases, managing social media campaigns, and building relationships with media personnel, influencers, and other stakeholders to promote their clients' or organization's image and reputation.
top_govt_colleges: Lady Shri Ram College for Women
top_private_colleges: Symbiosis Institute of Media and Communication

career_progression.year_0_2: Entry-level PR roles in small agencies or in-house teams, handling social media and basic PR tasks.
career_progression.year_3_5: Mid-level PR roles in larger agencies or in-house teams, handling more complex PR tasks and managing teams.
career_progression.year_6_10: Senior PR roles in top agencies or in-house teams, handling high-profile clients and leading teams.
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Starting a boutique PR agency or a digital marketing firm.
career_progression.global_pathway: Opportunities in international PR agencies, in-house teams, or as a freelancer in countries like the US, UK, or Singapore.

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Starting out can be challenging, with long working hours and low pay.
common_misconceptions: PR is all about glamour and fame
PR is only for celebrities and politicians
